biorhythmsWidget.physicalDescription: Physical rhythm reflects stamina and vitality. When it’s high, plan active tasks; when low, reduce intensity and recover.
biorhythmsWidget.emotionalDescription: Emotional rhythm affects mood and sensitivity. High values favor communication; low values suggest gentleness and rest.
biorhythmsWidget.intellectualDescription: Intellectual rhythm impacts focus and learning. High values are ideal for analysis, low values for routine tasks.
